name: Scotch Apple Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the apples into slices.
2. Combine the sugar, cinnamon, and salt in a small bowl.
3. Place half of the apple slices in a nonstick baking dish.
4. Sprinkle the apple slices with half of the sugar mixture.
5. Dot the remaining apple slices with half of the butter.
6. Sprinkle the oats evenly over all the ingredients.
7. Arrange another layer of apple slices and sprinkle with the rest of the milk.
8. Cover the dish and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
9. Remove the cover and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Serve hot or cold.
